feed.title: 全球互联网百晓生 · 事件流
feed.subtitle: 实时事件订阅源，基于情报站数据

entry.title: Digital Nomads: Africans from 30 countries could spend $871 million more to enter the US

summary.p: 非洲30国数字游民需多花8.71亿美元入境美国
标签：合作机会 | 类型：strategy | 地区：非洲 | 级别：B
来源：TechCabal

entry.title: Peec, one of Berlin’s rising startups, more than doubled annualized revenue in months to $10M, sources say

summary.p: 欧洲SaaS初创高增长，企业数字化采购工具需求旺盛，集成合作机会显现

entry.title: Series SEA: Who’s investing in the region’s education startups?

entry.title: Can Cashfree’s SME And Cross-Border Bets Solve Its Profitability Puzzle?

summary.p: 印度支付公司Cashfree转向中小企业与跨境支付，亚太金融科技赛道出现细分机会

entry.title: Yatra Q4 Profit Tanks 46% YoY To ₹8.2 Cr

summary.p: 印度在线旅游平台Yatra利润大幅下滑，亚太OTA行业面临竞争加剧与成本压力

来源：Inc42

entry.title: Branch confirms layoffs in Kenya and Nigeria despite profitable year

summary.p: 非洲数字信贷平台盈利后仍裁员，显示运营成本压力增大，金融科技外包和自动化需求上升

entry.title: IFC to invest $50m in BlackRock-managed Asia infrastructure credit fund
